title: Usp Match GunPack | PointBlank
body:
## **_A Usp Match GunPack for PointBlank. Very Simplely made._** ##
**It _REQUIRES_ PointBlank! Please do not complain when you dont know how to install!
Pack Made by Larsh512.**
**PACK HAS BEEN DISCONTINUED! Due to the fact that Vic is currently making a hl2 pack. Though feel free to use this packs assets.**
works on both forge, Fabric, And neoforge. (most likely, Please tell me iff it doesnt, For some odd reason?)

Credits:
- Vic for the p30l model i modified.
- The MMOD Team for the sounds
